prompt: Create a wide cinematic fantasy anime illustration of a radiant sky-city made of translucent glass cubes, floating platforms, and suspended crystal architecture under a vivid turquoise-blue sky. In the foreground, show two human children standing on a blocky tiled ledge, one boy with dark tousled hair, shorts, backpack and sneakers, and one girl with a bob haircut, school-like outfit and small satchel, both seen from behind as they gaze into the vast aerial world. Add a small white rounded robot or mascot sitting beside them. Populate the scene with exactly 14 visible small figures scattered across the platforms and sky: foreground boy, foreground girl, white mascot, left helmeted child, two small children walking together on the left path, tiny yellow-hatted child near center-left, child in white walking away at center, tiny green-capped child near lower center, yellow-cloaked pointed-hat traveler near center-right, small floating orange fairy-like figure in midair, right-side hovering helmeted child, yellow bird-hooded character at lower right, and cropped orange-hooded figure at the far right edge. The environment should feature huge floating city towers with circular ring roads and bridges, distant stacked observatories, aerial rails, glowing arcs, waterfalls spilling from glass platforms, hanging vines and greenery, transparent cyan and pink cubes, rainbow-tinted reflections, fluffy cumulus clouds rising through the city, and tiny flying vehicles or birds. Use high-detail Japanese fantasy anime concept art, luminous cel-shaded lighting, vibrant cyan, aquamarine, white, gold, and soft magenta palette, magical utopian atmosphere, immense scale, intricate background detail, sparkling particles, sunlit clouds, volumetric light, crisp linework, painterly texture, ultra-wide 16:9 composition, awe and wonder, no text, no watermark.
